LCC-MS8-L3-13001400-MSELA8-TTM-EUR-01 • MS English/ELA: Grade 8 • Central Idea & Supporting Ideas

The Strasbourg Notice

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: According to the notice, what is special about the new printing shop?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What evidence in the girl's opening tells you the kind of trip the students are on, and what evidence in the boy's reading of the notice tells you why the printing shop is significant?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS.ELA-LITERACY.RI.8.2  |  MS English/ELA: Grade 8: Central Idea & Supporting Ideas
